rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF JAKE SASSER JR.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Ex Parte Order Of 9-9-13 Allowing Sye Mayes To Substitute Attorneys For Jake Sasser, Jr.
rulings.Rulings: The Motion to Vacate Ex Parte Order of 9/9/13 Allowing Sye Mayes to Substitute Attorney for Jake Sasser, Jr., is denied. The Ex Parte Order Authorizing Conservator to Hire Counsel for Landlord-Tenant and Insurance Litigation and Appellate Matters was properly noticed and ordered. Any party who disagrees with the tentative and requests argument must notify the Court (415-551-3702) and all parties or counsel no later than 5:00 p.m. on November 5, 2013.
